untranslatable_reason: This signal requires cross-sectional ranking logic (percentile-based portfolio selection across an asset universe) and relative performance comparison between two extreme portfolios. The allowed indicators set contains only single-asset technical indicators and price/volume data. Percentile ranking, asset universe filtering, and portfolio-level comparative returns analysis are not supported by the indicator vocabulary. The 'returns' indicator represents single-asset returns, not cross-sectional ranking or percentile thresholds relative to a peer group.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally a statistical arbitrage / factor-based strategy requiring universe-level ranking and relative portfolio performance measurement. Cannot be expressed as single-asset technical rules using available indicators.
